title: Timeworn
description: Timeworn tracks your real playtime in Minecraft. Works right out of the box with no setup needed. Compatible with modpacks, supports Discord, and offers global stats.
body:
# NOW NOT AVAILABLE [![Timeworn - Time is the only thing you don't have.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffa14bec1e723b3b9b8a762a843a8a99f4c8ca27.png)](https://timeworn.xyz) Track your game time — and everyone else’s.
For the first time, you can. [![Open Dashboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c98a0a6ac24027ec630fd8ff189c49af69e9f26.png)](https://timeworn.xyz)


![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bfb256bee0f4bdd09f6f063c5b63d7d01fd7e47.png) It solves a glaring omission: Minecraft doesn’t show how long you've actually played. Unlike platforms like Steam or Battle net, Minecraft offers no built-in statistics for real-world time spent in-game. No hours. No days. [**Timeworn**](https://timeworn.xyz/) records your total playtime automatically, encrypts the data securely, and can send it to an external server for visualization — including intuitive dashboards and global [leaderboard](https://timeworn.xyz/leaderboard). We use anonymous data transmission by default. The mod can also send Discord webhooks. A dedicated Discord bot is in development to make this even more seamless. ![GUIDE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/234c1fbbeadb99522461338a1bfde2bf42c27cd8.png) 🔌 **Do I need to configure anything?**
If you're using an official Minecraft client — no setup required. Just install the mod. Plug and play. 🏴‍☠️ **What if I'm on a cracked client?**
The mod still works out of the box. Just don’t lose the file named ```user_mc_args.txt``` located in the ```config/``` folder inside your ```.minecraft directory.``` It’s your unique identifier on the network. 🧩 **Is it compatible with modpacks or other mods?**
Yes. Timeworn works with all modded setups, including heavy modpacks and custom builds. 💬 **Can I give feedback?**
Absolutely. Join the Discord and let me know what you think — suggestions, bugs, ideas — all welcome. ![Our message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe0c81b5a498a089cc7f1ebe7b01771617f9a3f2.png) You play.
Hours pass.
Worlds are built.
Days slip by — and you have no idea how many you've lost. Minecraft has been around for over fifteen years. Millions of players create, survive, and explore. But no one really knows how much of their life is buried in those pixelated worlds. Steam shows you the hours.
Even mobile games keep track.
But Minecraft? Silence.
Timeworn gives you back control.
It tracks every session, every launch, every minute — automatically.
Not just for stats, but for clarity. For mindfulness.
You're not in the dark anymore. Now you know.
And knowing — is freedom.
Or at the very least, the first step toward it.
![Support me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/176bea368b1461156b2cb639e3cca42d595afe59.png)
Like what I built? Fuel the project ❤️ [![Support on boosty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5af3cbdbffe54650b208ea9c7694464ba21f0541.png)](https://boosty.to/prantol) One coffee = one more feature ### Roadmap: Support Forge versions 1.12.2, 1.18, 1.19.2, 1.20.4, 1.20.6, 1.21, 1.21.4, 1.21.8 (priority on newer versions)
Support Fabric (in development)
Identification of bugs and errors, timely fixes. _Timeworn is an independent project and is not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft._
